Title: Hermann, Karl Friedrich
Overview: University of Heidelberg classical professor, taught Greek art. He was succeeded by Karl Bernhard Stark, who was named the first chair in archaeology.
Selected Bibliography: updated by Stark, Karl B. and Bähr, Johann Christian Felix. Lehrbuch der griechischen Antiquitäten. 3 vols. Heidelberg, J.C.B. Mohr, 1855.
